secondary.updateTitle: 1 month monetizing: from 843 to 2,110 users, 8 pros paid in 4 days
secondary.blogTitle: Para recibir, primero tenes que dar

Hero.intro: For technical founders in LatAm who actually want to ship. I'm a product engineer — I write code, talk to users, and treat both as one discipline. Building from Córdoba is harder than from SF, and that's the unfair advantage. Currently shipping Tegu (2,200 users), Docta Valley (240+ builders), and open source (118K views on launch).
Hero.beliefLead: I believe the best code is the code that creates impact — not the code that impresses other developers. Every project I touch starts with a question:
Hero.beliefQuote: What problem are we actually solving?
Hero.beliefClose: I don't write code for the sake of it. I build products that people actually use — tools that feel right, work fast, and get out of the way. Less architecture, more shipping.

About.label: About
About.title: Builder, not coder.
About.description: I'm Matias Vallejos, a product builder from Córdoba, Argentina. I create lean digital products that solve real problems, move fast, and ship with purpose. I don't optimize for tech stacks — I optimize for impact.

product.title: Product over code
product.description: I measure success by the problems I solve, not the lines I write. Technology is a means, never the end.

lean.title: Lean by default
lean.description: Every feature earns its place or gets cut. Constraints drive creativity. Small is a superpower.

craft.title: Craft matters
craft.description: Details compound. The border radius, the micro-interaction, the loading state — they all shape how a product feels.

ship.title: Ship with purpose
ship.description: Velocity without direction is just noise. I ship fast but always toward something meaningful.

y2026.title: Building Tegu
y2026.description: Focused full-time on product development. Creating lean tools for solo builders and small teams.

y2025.title: Co-founded Docta Valley
y2025.description: Co-founded a community connecting tech founders and builders in Córdoba. Creating the space to spread ideas, make connections, and launch startups.

y2024.title: First indie product
y2024.description: Launched my first product as a solo founder. Learned that shipping matters more than perfecting.

y2023.title: Went independent
y2023.description: Left agency work to build my own things. Córdoba became the base, the world became the market.

BlogPage.label: Blog
BlogPage.title: Thinking out loud.
BlogPage.description: Essays on product building, design craft, and life as an independent maker in Argentina. No filler, no thought leadership — just honest reflections from the work.

BooksPage.label: Books
BooksPage.titleAccent: Most won't change your life. These might.
BooksPage.description: What I read and what I actually kept. Verdicts are honest — if a book wasn't worth your time, I say so. Sorted by how much they shaped my thinking, not by when I read them.

ProjectsPage.label: Projects
ProjectsPage.title: Things I've shipped.
ProjectsPage.description: Lean digital products that solve real problems. Each one started small, shipped fast, and earned its place by the impact it created — not by the features it had.

lean.title: Start lean
lean.text: Every product begins with the smallest version that delivers real value. No feature creep.

ship.title: Ship fast
ship.text: Velocity matters. I aim for weekly shipping cycles, even if it's small iterations.

iterate.title: Iterate with purpose
iterate.text: Feedback drives direction. Every change is a response to something real, not a guess.

AboutWIP.title: We're working on it.
AboutWIP.description: The full About page is coming soon — currently re-writing it to do justice to the journey. In the meantime: the homepage tells most of the story.

ProjectCaseStudy.title: We're working on it.
ProjectCaseStudy.description: The full case study for this project is on the roadmap. Want the early version? Reach out and I'll send the deck.

Outro.title: I read every email.
Outro.subtitle: If something here resonated, hit reply. I respond to every founder email within 48 hours.
Outro.signature: Made from Córdoba 🇦🇷 by Matias Vallejos

Contact.title: Have a product idea? Let's build it together.
Contact.subtitle: I work best with founders and small teams who care about craft and want to ship something meaningful.
Contact.openFor: Open for: founder collabs · product ideas · investor conversations

Footer.quote: Made from Córdoba 🇦🇷 with mate and side projects.
